hooks.command: [ -f graphify-out/graph.json ] && echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","additionalContext":"graphify: Knowledge graph exists. Read graphify-out/GRAPH_REPORT.md first, prefer python3 -m graphify query/explain/path against graphify-out/graph.json for architecture questions, and rebuild with python3 scripts/build_graphify_graph.py after structural code changes."}}' || true
